name: dsabrew
description: Root scripts mirroring .github/workflows/ci.yml (run before push). Alle Unit-Tests inkl. Coverage: npm run test:coverage

scripts.ci: npm run ci:install && npm run ci:verify && npm run ci:audit
scripts.ci:fix: npm run ci:install && npm run lint:ts:fix && npm run lint:css:fix --prefix web && npm run ci:verify && npm run ci:audit
scripts.ci:install: npm ci && npm ci --prefix web && npm ci --prefix server
scripts.ci:verify: npm run lint:ts && npm run typecheck --prefix web && npm run lint:css --prefix web && npm run test:coverage --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web && npm run test:e2e:ci --prefix web && npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run test:coverage --prefix server
scripts.ci:precommit: npm run lint:ts && npm run typecheck --prefix web && npm run lint:css --prefix web && npm run typecheck --prefix server
scripts.ci:audit: npm audit --audit-level=high --production && npm audit --audit-level=high --prefix web && npm audit --audit-level=high --prefix server
scripts.ci:all: npm run ci && npm run ci:gitleaks
scripts.ci:quick: npm run ci:verify && npm run ci:audit
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix web && npm run test:coverage --prefix server
